scope.question: candidate_revision: Candidate has revision lanes or open findings: extraction_fidelity, safety_limitations.

inputs.summary: Repository plan, bounded research workflow rules, agent-run output contract, and Codex CLI worker constraints.
Triage state recommended job candidate-revision-senolytics-bone-rct-extraction-refresh-2026-06-21 and candidate readiness context.
Target D+Q bone RCT extraction-refresh candidate with linked extraction_fidelity and safety_limitations review lanes requiring revision.
Needs-revision extraction-fidelity review with an open major finding for full publication table, supplement, and exploratory subgroup extraction.
Needs-revision safety-limitations review with an open major finding for event-specific adverse-event extraction.
Accepting source-fidelity review lane for the target candidate.
Accepting synthesis-boundary review lane for the target candidate.
Accepting taxonomy-mapping review lane for the target candidate.
Schemas used for the candidate repair ledger and final agent-run output shape.

outputs.summary: Created the submitted repair candidate and updated the target D+Q bone RCT extraction-refresh candidate lifecycle from in_review to needs_revision with a summary that preserves the open extraction-fidelity and safety-limitations findings. No candidate was promoted.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded self-healing repair candidate and its required review lanes.
Aligns the target candidate lifecycle and summary with linked needs_revision review findings without promoting or mutating underlying evidence records.
